title: senecio aegyptius
intro: Senecio aegyptius, also known as Egyptian marigold or annual marigold, is a flowering plant species native to Egypt and parts of Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and promoting digestion. Traditionally, herbal preparations of Senecio aegyptius include infusions and teas, which are often used to treat colds, coughs, and skin conditions.
